overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in period clothing walking through a rainy historic city at night. The character transitions from wet cobblestone streets into a building, through a narrow covered alley, and into a lush interior courtyard garden.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with gas lamp lighting

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes from right to left across the intersection
character turns left at intersection and continues along sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking down wet cobblestone street in the rain, holding a pistol, approaching the outfitters building

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving across the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: multi-story brick building with arched windows and decorative cornice
cast iron street lamp illuminating the wet cobblestones with warm light
rain-slicked cobblestone road reflecting the gas lamp light
building with covered walkway and signage
large stone building with arched entrance and columns visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a rain-slicked cobblestone street lined with historic brick buildings and gas street lamps. A horse-drawn carriage passes across the intersection ahead. The character turns left at the corner and continues along the sidewalk toward a building entrance.

events.description: character enters the outfitters building doorway and begins ascending the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking up stone steps into a dark interior passage, entering the building

entered.detail: storefront entrance with signage and wooden doors
stone steps leading upward into the building interior
wall-mounted lanterns flanking the entrance and stairs

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the outfitters building entrance and enters, ascending a stone staircase into a dimly lit interior passage. The wall lanterns provide the only illumination as the street and outdoor elements fall away behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered alleyway with overhead walkways and balconies

events.description: emerges from dark stairwell into narrow covered alley with overhead structures

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow alley with wrought iron railings and overhead wooden walkways

black metal fence along the left side of the path
wooden walkway and balcony structure spanning overhead
wall-mounted lantern casting warm light on the brick walls
archway at the end of the alley covered in dense ivy

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairwell, the character enters a narrow covered alley with brick walls, wrought iron railings, and wooden balconies overhead. Wall lanterns illuminate the passage as the character walks toward an ivy-covered archway at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior courtyard garden with outdoor seating and tropical plants

events.description: passes through archway into open courtyard with garden and outdoor furniture
character slows and looks around the courtyard, panning camera upward

agents.ego_description: walking through the garden courtyard, passing potted plants and outdoor seating, approaching a seated man near a tree

notable_agents.action: man sitting in wicker chair near the tree smoking a pipe

entered.detail: large mature tree with dense foliage in the center of the courtyard
wicker seating furniture arranged around small tables
large potted plants with broad leaves and red flowers
white painted staircase leading to upper floor balcony
wooden balcony with railings on the second floor

segments.scene_description: Passing through the ivy-covered archway, the scene opens into a lush interior courtyard garden. A large tree dominates the center surrounded by wicker outdoor furniture and potted tropical plants. A man sits smoking near the tree as the character explores the space, looking up at the upper floor balconies and white staircase.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rainy, gas-lit city street into the secluded sanctuary of a lush interior courtyard. It begins by trailing a character down rain-slicked cobblestones past historic brick buildings and a passing horse-drawn carriage before turning a corner toward a building entrance. As the character enters the outfitters building, the outdoor elements fall away, and the camera ascends a stone staircase into a dimly lit interior passage illuminated by wall lanterns. The scene then shifts into a narrow covered alley defined by brick walls and wooden balconies, moving steadily toward an ivy-covered archway at the far end. Finally, the camera passes through the archway to reveal an expansive garden featuring a dominant central tree, tropical plants, and a man smoking near wicker furniture beneath white upper-floor balconies.
